ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider name */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving treatment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who provided the treatment */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nurse involved in the treatment */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the treatment event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the treatment took place */,
  "txid" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the treatment record */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data related to the treatment (e.g., prescriptions, notes) */,
  "hashpointer" TEXT /* Hash pointer for data integrity verification */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for any follow-up appointments */,
  "treatment_status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment (e.g., completed, ongoing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_nurse_id FOREIGN KEY ("nurse_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., hospital, general practice) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., facility, clinic) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage prescribed */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of administration */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of administration (e.g., oral, intravenous) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Known side effects of the medication */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Known contraindications of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment associated with the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "date_diagnosed" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the diagnosis */,
  "referral_status" TEXT /* Referral status (e.g., referred, not referred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES role_permissions ("role")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission combination */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role for which the permission is applicable */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission granted to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, add, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "device_information" TEXT /* Information about the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., patient treatment summary) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "patient_medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-medication link */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the medication */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prescribed medication */,
  "prescribed_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "refill_information" TEXT /* Details about medication refills */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the prescription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
